evals.prompt: 端到端验证 testspec 链路：请从新建一个「手机号注册」测试变更开始，基于需求完成 requirements-analysis.md、specs/testpoints.md、artifacts/testcases.json，并运行 testspec-review 生成 review-report.md。不要 publish 到 testlib。
evals.expected_output: 完整执行 testspec-new → testspec-analysis → testspec-points → testspec-generate → testspec-review，所有阶段产物落在同一个 testspec/changes/<name>/ 目录中，跨阶段上下文元数据连续传播，最终生成 review-report.md 且不发布到 testlib。

assertions.text: Creates one change directory containing proposal, analysis, points, generated cases, and review report
assertions.script: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; ok=any(all(p.exists() for p in [root/'proposal.md', root/'requirements-analysis.md', root/'specs/testpoints.md', root/'artifacts/testcases.json', root/'review-report.md']) for root in Path('testspec/changes').glob('*')); print('PASS' if ok else 'FAIL')"

assertions.text: Propagates context metadata from upstream artifacts into downstream stages
Generated testcases.json is valid JSON and contains at least one executable test case
assertions.script:
python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; ok=False
for p in Path('testspec/changes').glob('*/artifacts/testcases.json'):
    data=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')); cases=data.get('testcases') or data.get('cases') or [] ; ok=bool(cases)
    if ok: break
print('PASS' if ok else 'FAIL')"

assertions.text: Review report evaluates the generated cases rather than replacing or regenerating them
assertions.script: grep -R "评审\|review" testspec/changes/*/review-report.md 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Does not publish artifacts into testlib during the review-only chain
assertions.script: test -z "$(find testlib -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Final answer summarizes each completed stage and the concrete output paths

evals.prompt: 端到端验证 update 路径：在已有「手机号注册」变更目录（含 requirements.md、requirements-analysis.md、specs/testpoints.md、artifacts/testcases.json）的基础上，产品补充了新的短信验证码有效期规则（从 5 分钟改为 3 分钟），请先用 testspec-update 同步口径，再用 testspec-analysis 重新分析。
evals.expected_output: testspec-update 更新 requirements.md 中验证码有效期口径，递增 source_revision.version，标记 requirements-analysis.md 为 stale 并写入 stale_reason 和 next_skill；随后 testspec-analysis 消费 stale_downstream_artifacts，发现命中自身产物，重新生成 requirements-analysis.md 而非复用旧口径结论。

files.content:
# SMS Registration

手机号注册流程。

# Requirements

## 功能列表

- REQ-001 短信验证码有效期 5 分钟。
- REQ-002 验证码输入错误 3 次锁定。

<!-- testspec-context
{"source_skill":"testspec-new","blocking_open_questions":[],"dynamic_followups":[],"source_revision":{"version":1,"summary":"初版短信注册需求","updated_by_skill":"testspec-new"},"requirement_quality":{"overall_score":90,"readiness":"ready_for_analysis"}}
-->

# Requirements Analysis

- 验证码 5 分钟有效期需覆盖边界：4m59s 通过、5m01s 失败。
- 锁定后解锁机制未明确。

<!-- testspec-context
{"source_skill":"testspec-analysis","source_revision":{"version":1}}
-->

# Test Points

- TP-001 验证码 5 分钟有效期边界。
- TP-002 错误 3 次锁定。
{"schema_version":2,"testcases":[{"id":"TC-001","title":"验证码有效期边界"},{"id":"TC-002","title":"错误锁定"}]}

assertions.script: DIR=testspec/changes/sms-registration && grep -Eq '"version"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*2' "$DIR/requirements.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: testspec-update writes stale_reason and next_skill in context
assertions.script: DIR=testspec/changes/sms-registration && grep -q "stale_reason" "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -q "next_skill" "$DIR/requirements.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: testspec-analysis regenerates analysis instead of reusing old 5-minute conclusion
assertions.script: DIR=testspec/changes/sms-registration && grep -q '3.*分钟\|3.min' "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && ! grep -q '5.*分钟有效期需覆盖边界' "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Old analysis conclusions about 5-minute boundary are not carried forward as active

evals.prompt: 验证版本不匹配检测：已有「密码重置」变更目录，requirements.md 的 source_revision.version 为 2，但 requirements-analysis.md 的 context 仍记录 version 1。stale_downstream_artifacts 列表为空。请运行 testspec-analysis。
evals.expected_output: testspec-analysis 检测到 requirements.md source_revision.version (2) 高于 requirements-analysis.md context 中的 version (1)，即使 stale_downstream_artifacts 未显式列出 requirements-analysis.md，也重新生成分析而非复用旧结论。

files.content:
# Password Reset

密码重置流程。

# Requirements

## 功能列表

- REQ-001 密码重置链接有效期 24 小时。
- REQ-002 重置后旧密码立即失效。

<!-- testspec-context
{"source_skill":"testspec-update","blocking_open_questions":[],"dynamic_followups":[],"source_revision":{"version":2,"summary":"补充旧密码失效规则","updated_by_skill":"testspec-update"},"stale_downstream_artifacts":[],"requirement_quality":{"overall_score":92,"readiness":"ready_for_analysis"}}
-->

# Requirements Analysis

- 密码重置链接 24 小时有效期边界测试。
- 未涉及旧密码失效验证。

<!-- testspec-context
{"source_skill":"testspec-analysis","source_revision":{"version":1}}
-->

assertions.text: Analysis is regenerated despite empty stale_downstream_artifacts
assertions.script: DIR=testspec/changes/password-reset && grep -q '旧密码.*失效\|old.password.*invalid' "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: New analysis covers REQ-002 which was added in version 2

assertions.script: DIR=testspec/changes/password-reset && grep -Eq '"version"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*2' "$DIR/requirements-analysis.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL
